$description: Registry of post-deploy enhancement offers shown after a wizard run when the user confirms 'Was this automation set up successfully? → Yes' (or taps the 'Looks great!' pill). Loaded by macOS EnhancementOfferRegistry.swift, evaluated by EnhancementOfferMatcher.swift. Each offer becomes a tap-pill on the post-success assistant message. Tapping fires AIHarness.continueDevelopment(for:withFeedback:) with prose lifted from feedbackPromptTemplate.

offers.pitch: Hosted high-score board so players compete and share rankings.
Tap-friendly AudioManager + coherent SFX tied to game events.
offers.llmAppliesWhenPrompt: Would this artifact benefit from sound effects? Look for game-loop events (collision, score change, game over, level up) WITHOUT existing audio calls (new Audio, AudioContext, .play(), AudioManager). Reply yes ONLY when the artifact is an interactive game/animation that's currently silent. Reply no for static UIs, forms, or already-sonified games.
